description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular tabletop with a glossy black surface, supported by four elegantly curved wooden legs. The table includes a single shallow drawer beneath the tabletop, with a subtle round knob handle at its center. On top, there are three decorative items: a geometric gold metal shelf, a matte gray vase with green foliage, and a black coffee mug. The lower shelf provides additional storage or display space, matching the tabletop's finish. The wood frame has a rich, dark brown finish, contrasting with the black surfaces. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban interiors or transitional spaces.
description: A dark wood nightstand with a glossy black top and shelf, featuring a single drawer and decorative items including a gold geometric shelf, vase, and mug.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with a round knob, all decorative items, and the full width of the tabletop and lower shelf.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the nightstand, the side profile of the legs, and the alignment of the decorative items.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the nightstand, the geometric shelf most prominently, and the arrangement of items from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the geometric shelf's structure, the side profile of the legs, and the placement of the mug and vase.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside other furniture
